metadata.title: Luxury Villa Bookings
metadata.description: Discover a curated villa collection, then explore the booking flow, bilingual UX, and admin tools behind the demo.

nav.mobileMenuDescription: Primary site links and account actions

hero.subtitle: A refined villa booking demo with a smaller curated collection, polished browsing, and a complete booking flow.
hero.panelCopy: Quiet, high-margin stays with a smaller inventory and a more deliberate booking pace.

home.whySubtitle: A polished booking experience, bilingual content, and admin tooling presented through a believable boutique-resort concept.
home.featureSecureDesc: End-to-end encrypted transactions with instant confirmation and full refund protection.
home.feature24Desc: Dedicated luxury concierge at your fingertips, any hour, any request, anywhere.
home.featureCuratedDesc: Every property personally inspected and vetted to meet our uncompromising standards.
home.featurePersonalDesc: From private chefs to helicopter transfers — your wish is our command.
home.ctaSubtitle: See how the public booking flow, villa detail pages, and admin tools connect in one portfolio-ready build.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: A boutique villa concept designed to feel premium in public and transparent in the details.
about.storyTitle: Born From a Passion for Perfection
about.storyP1: ResortsGeh is framed as a boutique villa collection with a deliberately focused inventory. The experience prioritizes calm discovery, a premium visual rhythm, and a booking flow that still feels credible at a smaller scale.
about.storyP2: Instead of overstating inventory or pretending to be a live operator, the project uses a tighter set of villas, reviews, and bookings to present a more believable demo. That makes the product easier to evaluate both as a user experience and as a portfolio build.
about.valueLuxuryDesc: Every villa is personally vetted to meet the highest standards of quality and comfort.
about.valueSustainDesc: We partner with eco-conscious properties that respect and preserve local environments.
about.valueCommunityDesc: We support local communities through partnerships with regional hospitality providers.
about.valueExcellenceDesc: From first inquiry to checkout, we deliver a seamless five-star experience.
about.storyImageAlt: Interior of a private villa suite
about.projectTitle: A polished demo, not a live resort operator
about.projectDesc: ResortsGeh is presented like a premium hospitality product, while the disclaimer makes the fictional scope explicit for portfolio review.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: ResortsGeh is a fictional hospitality product built for portfolio review. The public pages are intentionally presented like a premium villa brand, but the platform is not a live booking business.
disclaimer.introNotice: Listings, pricing, reviews, and availability are sample content used to demonstrate UX, content structure, authentication, and admin workflows in a more realistic setting.
disclaimer.contentDesc: Villa names, descriptions, pricing, reviews, and booking states are sample data. No real reservations, payments, or fulfillment are processed through this project.
disclaimer.imagesDesc: Property photography is sourced from Unsplash and remains credited to the original photographers under the Unsplash License.
disclaimer.purposeDesc: The goal is to show a complete product surface, including public browsing, bookings, role-based admin flows, i18n, and system polish suitable for a portfolio case study.
disclaimer.privacyDesc: This demo uses local SQLite storage with seeded accounts. It is not connected to a live hospitality backend or a third-party data pipeline.
disclaimer.techDesc: This project was built using the following technologies:
disclaimer.accountsDesc: Use these seeded credentials to review guest and admin flows locally.
disclaimer.developerTagline: Full-stack portfolio build focused on product polish and system clarity.

validation.nameMin: Villa name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.slugMin: Slug must be at least 2 characters.

validation.pricePositive: Price per night must be greater than 0.
